ksa_text: Knowledge of dbt and transformation framework patterns, including model layering strategies (staging, intermediate, mart layers), testing approaches, documentation generation, and automated lineage creation.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Data Architecture (domain affinity 0.60); strategic/governance framing outweighs technical signals. pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 4 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
